quality.rationale: 需利用黎曼张量对称性构造试探解并通过二次缩并反解系数，逻辑链条清晰完整，但属纯微分几何恒等式推导，无具体天体或观测物理背景。

origin.question: Problem 9.7. In a space of fewer than 4 dimensions simple expressions can be given for the Riemann tensor.(c) Express the Riemann tensor for a 3-dimensional space in terms of the metric and the Ricci tensor.
